response.justification: Bogdan brings 16+ years of polyglot software engineering, solid high-throughput distributed systems experience from Sociomantic (millions of HTTP requests/second), and strong TDD/CI/CD discipline. However, the role is deeply specialized in growth engineering and experimentation infrastructure — A/B testing frameworks, feature flagging, experiment assignment, statistical guardrails, rollout automation, and telemetry pipelines — none of which appear anywhere in the resume. His current and past titles (Senior/Staff) also fall short of the Principal/IC6 bar, which requires demonstrated cross-team architectural ownership and systemic organizational influence at scale.
strengths: High-throughput distributed systems experience at Sociomantic: millions of HTTP requests/second, async I/O, low-latency design
Broad language coverage (C/C++, Java, C#, TypeScript/JavaScript) aligns with the required language stack
Consistent TDD, CI/CD, and trunk-based development discipline across multiple roles signals strong engineering fundamentals
concerns: No experimentation platform experience whatsoever — zero mention of A/B testing, feature flagging, experiment assignment, or rollout risk management
No telemetry or metrics infrastructure work — the role's core deliverable is unified growth measurement and instrumentation systems
No evidence of Principal/IC6-level impact: no cross-team technical leadership, multi-workstream ownership, or systemic influence at organizational scale
